# Guler Open IT Platform — Full Article Index

> Complete index of all technical articles published on farukguler.com.
> Author: Faruk Güler — IT System Administrator, DevOps Engineer & Developer.
> Topics: Linux, Windows, Active Directory, Networking, Security, Virtualization, Cloud, Docker, Kubernetes, Blockchain.

---

## Content Access

- [RSS Feed](https://farukguler.com/feed.xml): Machine-readable XML feed for latest updates.
- [llms.txt](https://farukguler.com/llms.txt): Curated priority index for AI discovery.
